ogTitle: Two Mile Flat vs Tyalgum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Two Mile Flat and Tyalgum.
heading: Two Mile Flat vs Tyalgum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Two Mile Flat, New South Wales and Tyalgum, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Two Mile Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tyalgum (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Two Mile Flat or Tyalgum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Two Mile Flat has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Tyalgum scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Two Mile Flat scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Tyalgum scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Two Mile Flat or Tyalgum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Two Mile Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
